title: Super-Realistic-BETA
description: This is my most realistic reasorce pack
body:
What it does: This texture pack provides a complete replacement of Minecraft's standard block textures with highly detailed and realistic versions, all rendered at a crisp 128x resolution for maximum visual impact.

Why download: If you crave a significant visual upgrade that brings a new level of realism to your Minecraft worlds, this pack is for you. The enhanced detail creates a more immersive and believable atmosphere, making your creations and discoveries more visually rewarding.

Critical information: This pack exclusively changes block textures. For optimal performance and to avoid potential visual glitches, it is highly advisable to have OptiFine or another compatible mod installed that supports HD texture packs. Keep in mind that the 128x resolution demands more resources from your computer.

![Realistic?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc30301925ce6e878bbf05561630e1c395ac79ff_0.webp)
